metaTitle: Harmonic Analysis for Portuguese Businesses | Carelabs
metaDescription: Discover why harmonic analysis is essential for Portuguese businesses. Improve power quality, prevent system failures.
h2: Why Are Harmonic Analysis and Research Crucial for Portuguese Businesses?
paragraphs: Harmonics is an essential component of a power system since it influences the quality of the energy and how things operate. High harmonic levels can cause equipment components to overheat and decrease their service life. Harmonics modify pure sine waves generated by a perfect power source. Harmonic distortion impairs an organization’s capacity to produce goods and conduct business. Here are a few examples of how harmonic distortion affects business.

Loads that do not follow a straight line and draw current in short, rapid bursts generate harmonics. These pulses cause harmonic currents to flow throughout the power system as distorted current waves. Harmonics reduce the dependability and efficiency of commercial power. Most businesses have electrical systems that can tolerate up to 15% nonlinear loads safely.

If nonlinear loads account for more than 15 percent of the total load, they may result in harmful harmonic distortions. Therefore, it is vital to monitor harmonic levels to ensure they do not get excessively increased. Consequently, a comprehensive investigation and analysis can assist in keeping track of potential threats and their origins. This can assist in the avoidance of harmonic-related issues during the design process and reduce the likelihood of unfavorable results.
Even if harmonic issues are rare, a prompt examination must be performed to ensure that they are not serious. Following are the steps for determining the harmonic level:

Carelabs is a recognized organization that researches and analyses harmonics. Professionals with extensive knowledge can conduct exact and secure evaluations to identify problematic harmonic levels and assist with maintaining appropriate harmonic levels to prevent future difficulties.

Carelabs employs personnel in many locations to ensure that our professionals are nearby in the event of an emergency or for normal tasks. Carelabs immediately attained ISO 9001:2008 certification and built a clientele with a solid reputation and positive comments. In large cities such as Lisbon, Porto, Vila Nova de Gaia, and Braga , Carelabs provides investigation and analysis services.
